pages.title: 心: temporary health
pages.text: $(l)心$() raises your temporary max health. Writing it again adds more health and refreshes the newest expiry time.$(br2)Because it is an easy glyph, the cap is restrained: at most 10 extra hearts, roughly one full row. Use it before a fight to buy room for mistakes.

pages.title: 命: cheap insurance
pages.text: $(l)命$() is a low-tier death save. When lethal damage arrives, it locks you at 1 health and gives a very short invulnerability window.$(br2)It does not handle heavy ink wound buildup. It is a daily safety net for weaker staves.

pages.title: 救: stronger save
pages.text: $(l)救$() has more strokes and needs at least a stone stave to cast reliably. When lethal damage triggers it, you enter invulnerability, survive at 1 health, and clear part of your ink wound based on stave tier.$(br2)Iron and above gives 5 seconds of invulnerability; diamond clears 80% ink wound, netherite clears all of it. Rescue saves you, but it is not a free resurrection.

pages.title: What gets cleared
pages.text: Death, leaving the game, or switching saves clears these custom states: temporary health from 心, 命/救 insurance, 忍 ink wound pools, 息/隐/坚/稳, 力/怒, 明/脉, and 魄 recovery state.$(br2)If you want the effect again, write it again.
